description_long: This object is a set of three ornate swords, each featuring a long, straight, double-edged blade with a pointed tip. The blades display intricate engravings or runes along their length, with one blade exhibiting a distinct greenish hue and glowing script, while the others are metallic silver and gray. The crossguards are elaborate, with dark, wing-like extensions and decorative motifs, providing both protection and visual flair. The handles are wrapped in a brown, leather-like material, offering a secure grip, and end in a rounded pommel with additional detailing. The overall design suggests a blend of fantasy and historical influences, making these swords both functional and ceremonial. The craftsmanship and materials indicate these are high-quality, visually striking weapons suitable for display or use.
description: A set of three ornate, engraved swords with straight double-edged blades, decorative crossguards, and brown wrapped handles. One blade features glowing green runes, while the others are metallic silver and gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three swords side by side, highlighting the engraved blades, decorative crossguards, and brown handles.
description_view_1: Side profile view displaying the thinness of the blades and the layered construction of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite sides of the swords and the continuation of engravings and handle details.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the slimness of the blades and the handle's ergonomic shape.
attribute_handle_design: straight, brown leather-wrapped, rounded pommel, ergonomic grip
attribute_ornamentation: engraved runes and decorative motifs on blade and guard
